description: This file defines a Spring Boot exception handler class ApiExceptionHandler that provides centralized handling of specific exceptions (IllegalArgumentException and IllegalStateException) to produce standardized HTTP error responses.

classes.name: ApiExceptionHandler
classes.description: A Spring Boot REST controller advice that handles specific exceptions globally and returns standardized error responses.

methods.name: handleBadRequest
methods.description: Handles IllegalArgumentException by returning a 400 Bad Request response with a timestamp, error type, and message.

methods.name: handleServerError
methods.description: Handles IllegalStateException by returning a 500 Internal Server Error response with a timestamp, error type, and message.
